description_long: This object consists of three adult pedestrians standing side by side, each with distinct attire and posture. The leftmost figure wears a sleeveless, ruffled dress with a high-low hem and high-heeled shoes, exuding a formal or party-ready appearance. The central figure is dressed in a knee-length, long-sleeved coat or dress with a straight cut and flat shoes, presenting a more neutral and modest style. The rightmost figure wears a long-sleeved, knee-length dress with a v-neck and ankle boots, suggesting a casual or semi-formal look. All three figures have their arms slightly extended outward, as if in a relaxed or neutral stance. Their hairstyles vary, with the leftmost having a short, neat style, the center with short hair, and the rightmost with a tied-back look. The group is visually diverse, suitable for representing typical urban pedestrians.
description: Three adult pedestrians stand side by side, each with distinct dresses, footwear, and hairstyles, arms slightly extended in a neutral pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing three adults with different dresses and footwear, arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the silhouettes, dress shapes, and footwear profiles of all three figures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back details of the dresses, hairstyles, and overall posture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the contours and layered clothing of the figures.
attribute_clothing_type: formal ruffled dress, long-sleeved knee-length coat or dress, long-sleeved v-neck dress
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
